findings.message: Source file core/config/ConfigHandler.ts was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

Source file core/config/loadLocalAssistants.ts was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

pr.title: feat: add .continue/configs support
pr.body:
## Summary
- Adds `.continue/configs/` as a third directory (alongside `.continue/agents/` and `.continue/assistants/`) for loading local config profiles
- YAML files placed in `.continue/configs/` (workspace or global) are now discovered, watched, and loaded as local profiles

## Changes
- `loadLocalAssistants.ts`: Updated `isContinueConfigRelatedUri` and `isContinueAgentConfigFile` to recognize `.continue/configs/`
- `ConfigHandler.ts`: Added loading of definition files from the `configs` subdirectory in `getLocalProfiles`

## Test plan
- [ ] Place a YAML config file in `.continue/configs/` and verify it appears as a selectable profile
- [ ] Verify file creation/deletion in `.continue/configs/` triggers config reload
- [ ] Verify existing `.continue/agents/` and `.continue/assistants/` directories still work

<!-- This is an auto-generated description by cubic. -->
---
## Summary by cubic
Adds `.continue/configs/` as a third config directory. Loading across `assistants`, `agents`, and `configs` now runs in parallel via `Promise.all` for faster discovery with proper error propagation.

- **New Features**
  - `ConfigHandler.getLocalProfiles` now loads definition files from `.continue/configs/`.
  - URI helpers updated to recognize and watch `.continue/configs/` files.

<sup>Written for commit 8747c5f52821537c244da5fbb11834dea9d32bb0. Summary will update on new commits.</sup>

<!-- End of auto-generated description by cubic. -->
pr.author: RomneyDa
